Sage Bot Item Code: A236
Smasher of Enemies

Triggers: 6 sec

Thunderstrike
The artifact owner removes 5 random positive effects from all enemy units and stuns them for 3 sec. The owner also deal physical damage equal to 50% of their max health to all stunned enemies every second for 3 sec and recovers health equal to 40% of the damage dealt by the ability.

Requirements: 90-100
